sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n38583" key="e)pekfw/nhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπεκ-φώνησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n38583.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">exclamation,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Fig.</title_> </bibl> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Rhet.Lat.Min.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.66</biblScope> </bibl> Halm.</sense> </entryFree>
